_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: To confirm the M2-like phenotype of CD163+ macrophages, we assessed CX3CR1 expression within this population and observed nearly 100% of cells expressing CX3CR1
details: Successfully detected M2-like macrophage marker; nearly 100% of CD163+ macrophages expressed CX3CR1; also detected on approximately 4% of CD4+PD-1+ T cells
